name: note-taking-ai
description: Note Taking Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Create a new note with title, content, optional comma-separated tags and category.

tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Search notes by keyword. search_in: all, title, content, tags.

tools.name: summarize_notes
tools.description: Summarize notes. note_ids: comma-separated IDs or empty for all. Extracts key sentences.

tools.name: export_markdown
tools.description: Export notes as Markdown. note_ids: comma-separated or empty for all.
